title: Tsarin Haɗin Gwiwa
attention: Wannan shirin haɗin gwiwa ba an yi shi ba don kiran 'yan uwa' ko 'abokan ciniki.' Don Allah karanta {faqLink} kafin ci gaba.
earnPerSale: Samu {amount} a kowane siyar na abokin ciniki sabon!
shareUrl: Raba URL ɗin haɗin gwiwa na musamman tare da abokai

paymentSetup.title: Saita Biyan Kuɗi
paymentSetup.choosePayment: Zaɓi abin da kake so a yi da kuɗin haɗin gwiwa ɗinka
paymentSetup.createPrepay: Ƙirƙiri Biyan kuɗi na gaba da adadin da za a yi amfani da shi kai tsaye a kan takardun biyan kuɗina.

tosPage.title: Sharuɗɗan Sabis
tosPage.welcome: Barka da zuwa Shirin Haɗin Gwiwa na InterServer

earnDescription: Ta hanyar ƙara haɗin InterServer a gidan yanar gizon ku, za ku sami {amount} a matsayin kuɗin hukuma kan kowane sabon siyarwa da muka samu sakamakon danna haɗin da ke gidan yanar gizon ku.
latestWebTraffic: Baƙin yanar gizo na Baya-bayan nan

status.title: Matsayi
status.defaultDesc: An yi rajista na abokin ciniki a ƙarƙashin abokin hulɗa amma bai cika buƙatun ba tukuna.
status.pendingDesc: Abokin ciniki ya cika buƙatun lokaci da biyan kuɗi, kuma yana jiran tabbatarwa daga mai gudanarwa.
status.failedDesc: Abokin ciniki bai cika buƙatun ba ko kuma abokin hulɗa ya keta sharuɗɗa wajen samun abokin ciniki.
status.lockedDesc: Asusun abokin ciniki an kulle shi kuma ba ya aiki.
status.rejectedDesc: Asusun ya gaza cika buƙatun har abada.
status.paidDesc: An riga an biya abokin hulɗa don rajistan abokin ciniki.

webTrafficPage.viewInNewTab: Duba Shafi a Sabon Tab (yi hankali da kukis)

viewBanners.title: Banners
viewBanners.bannerNote: Don ganin cikakken bayanin banner kamar lambar HTML, girman hoto, da sauransu, danna kan kowane hoto na banner da kuke son amfani da shi a gidan yanar gizon ku.
viewBanners.usefulLinks: Hanyoyin haɗin Abokin Hulɗa Masu Amfani
viewBanners.vpsWithTracking: Shafin VPS tare da Kalmar Tsarawa

dockSetup.title: Saitunan Dock
dockSetup.landingPageSetup: Saitunan Shafin Saukar na Abokin Hulɗa
dockSetup.couponTooltip: Lokacin da sabon abokin ciniki ya yi amfani da wannan coupon, za a alamta su a matsayin mai koma daga gare ku kuma a lissafa su a matsayin siyarwar abokin hulɗa.
dockSetup.descriptionPlaceholder: Yi amfani da wannan coupon lokacin sanya oda don samun watan farko na hosting akan penny 1 kawai.

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.a1: Muna biya dalar Amurka 100 a matsayin kuɗin hukuma a kowane siyarwa, kuma wannan yana ɗaya daga cikin shirye-shiryen abokin hulɗa mafi biyan kuɗi.
faqPage.q2: 2. Nawa lokaci ne kafin siyarwa ta bayyana a asusuna?
faqPage.a2: Ya kamata ya bayyana nan da nan.
faqPage.q3: 3. Na ɗan yi siyarwa. Ina zan iya ganin ta?
faqPage.a3_step2: A ƙasan dama za ku ga zaɓin Duba Shafin Abokin Hulɗa.
faqPage.a3_step3: Anan za ku iya ganin duk kuɗin hukumar da ke jiran amincewar ku.
faqPage.q4: 4. Na san wanda ke buƙatar hosting. Ta yaya zan sami kuɗin koma?
faqPage.a4_step2: Gungura zuwa ƙasa don ganin haɗin abokin hulɗar ku.
faqPage.a4_step3: Aika wannan haɗin zuwa ga sanannunku wanda ke buƙatar hosting.
faqPage.a4_step4: Lokacin da suka danna haɗin kuma suka yi oda asusun tare da mu, za ku sami kuɗin hukuma.
faqPage.q5: 5. An yarda da ni don shirin abokin hulɗa na InterServer Hosting. Yanzu me zan yi?
faqPage.a5_step1: Shiga asusun abokin hulɗar ku don samun damar kayan tallace-tallace na InterServer ta danna tabs Banners da Hanyoyin haɗi.
faqPage.a5_step2: Zaɓi kayan tallace-tallacen da kuke son ƙara zuwa gidan yanar gizon ku.
faqPage.a5_step3: Za ku ga lambobin banner a gefen dama na duk banners; kwafi ku manna wannan lambar zuwa gidan yanar gizon ku.
faqPage.a5_step4: Lokacin da wani ya danna haɗin kuma ya sayi asusun hosting, za ku sami kuɗin hukuma.
faqPage.q6: 6. Zan iya yi PPC bid don inganta InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Ee, amma kada ku yi bid kan sunan kamfaninmu, bambancin sunansa, kuskuren rubutu, ko kowane kalmar maɓalli da ta ƙunshi ɓangaren sa ciki har da InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Mayar da hankali kan bids don kalmomin maɓalli kamar hosting mai sauri, hosting PHP, hosting WordPress.
faqPage.a6_line3: Tuntuɓe mu idan kuna buƙatar taimako wajen ƙirƙire-ƙirƙire kalmomin maɓalli.
faqPage.a6_line4: Tabbatar da ƙara InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting a matsayin kalmomin maɓalli mara kyau na kamfen.
faqPage.q7: 7. Na yi siyarwa. Yaushe za a biya ni?
faqPage.a7_line1: Bayan kwanaki 90 siyarwa mai inganci za ta canza daga matsayin Default zuwa Pending.
faqPage.a7_line2: Da zarar siyarwar tana cikin Pending za a biya ta a cikin kwanaki 7 na farko na watan.
faqPage.q8: 8. Ina da siyarwa mai jira wanda ba a biya ba.
faqPage.a8_line1: Yana iya samun dalilai da yawa. Wasu lokuta muna buƙatar ƙarin lokaci don tabbatar da siyarwa.
faqPage.a8_line2: Ɗaya daga cikin abubuwan sauƙi da za a duba shi ne tabbatar cewa an saita hanyar biyan kuɗin ku.
faqPage.q9: 9. Tsawon lokaci nawa za siyarwar/kuɗin hukumata su kasance suna jira kafin a amince da su?
faqPage.q10: 10. Zan iya amfani da haɗin abokin hulɗar na don nufin kaina akan asusun da zan yi amfani da su don amfani na mutum?
faqPage.a10: A'a. Duk wani hulɗa da asusun da aka sake sayar da shi zai haifar da gazawar siyarwa kai tsaye.
faqPage.q11: 11. Me ya sa aka ƙi kuɗin hukumata?
faqPage.a11_intro: An ƙi yana nufin kuɗin hukuma ya gaza har abada.
faqPage.a11_reasons: Wasu dalilai na wannan na iya zama:
faqPage.a11_reason1: Abokin ciniki ya riga ya yi rajista tare da mu a baya.
faqPage.a11_reason2: Hanyar biyan kuɗi ɗaya ta kasance kamar yadda asusun ɗaya.
faqPage.a11_reason3: Tsarin ya gano cewa ku, abokin hulɗa, kuna kuma amfani da asusun abokin ciniki.
faqPage.a11_policy: Tunda biyan kuɗin mu na dalar Amurka 100 a kowace siyarwa sau da yawa ya fi abin da muke dawo daga abokin ciniki ma bayan shekara 1, muna da manufar tsauri don kama kumamai da ba su cika sharuɗɗanmu ba. Idan kuna tura aboki ko abokin ciniki, kawai ku ba su haɗin ko coupon. Kada ku raba hanyoyin biyan kuɗi kuma kada ku yi amfani da asusun.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Da fatan za ku kuma duba sharuɗɗan abokin hulɗa mu a nan:
faqPage.q12: 12. Ni ne mai ƙira/mai haɓakawa kuma zan tura abokan ciniki. Shin haka yake?
faqPage.a12_line1: Wannan shiri ba zai yi aiki da mu ba (ko kowane shirin abokin hulɗa na hosting). Da zarar an yi daidaitawa a cikin asusun da yawa, kuɗin hukuma zai gaza.
faqPage.a12_line2: Ana yin wannan ne don hana mutum ɗaya ya yi rajista kuma ya sami kuɗi daga shirin abokin hulɗa ta hanyar tura kansa.
faqPage.a12_line3: Kuna iya tunanin watsi kai tsaye da abokan ciniki da lissafin su amfani da wani abu kamar PayPal. Kuna iya siyan asusun reseller hosting daga gare mu.
faqPage.q13: 13. Ina zan iya saita biyan kuɗina?
faqPage.a13: Kuna iya saita biyan kuɗin ku,
